removeMemberConfirm.title: Remove member?
removeMemberConfirm.description: Remove this person from the group?

leaveConfirm.title: Leave group?
leaveConfirm.description: You will no longer receive messages from this group.

list.emptyHint: Start a new message to begin chatting.

guidance.intro: Hi! I'm here to help you find your way around Alkemio. Ask me anything about spaces, collaboration, or how things work.

infoDialog.title: About the assistant
infoDialog.content: This assistant is an AI guide for Alkemio, currently in beta. It can help you understand features and find your way around. Answers may be imperfect — please verify important information.

clearConfirm.title: Clear this conversation?
clearConfirm.description: This starts a fresh conversation with the assistant. The current conversation will be cleared.
